user_message: Robert Foster at Quantum Analytics just sent this. Help me identify the blockers.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Robert Foster <robert.foster@quantumanaly.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-02-15 09:58 EST
Subject: URGENT: migration architecture Issue at Quantum Analytics

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with migration architecture. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

---
From: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
To: Robert Foster <robert.foster@quantumanaly.com>
Date: 2024-01-27 10:04 EST
Subject: Re: migration architecture Discussion - Next Steps

Just checking in on the migration architecture proposal. Our Head of Digital is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF40-F trap (Skips authority check (is sender the actual decision-maker)); produces complete Commitment assessment, BPF advance verdict, milestone proposal, forecast category recommendation, ac
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF40-F failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF40-F failure mode (Skips authority check (is sender the actual decision-maker))
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct migration architecture decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF40-F -- Skips authority check (is sender the actual decision-maker)
